chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1334 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.5183/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.5184/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For orders on CMA No.5185/2025 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 11.09.2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Advocate General Mr. Alam Sher Khan Bozdar, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Ali Napar, Advocate for petitioner ************** 1. Granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4&5. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, learned Additional Prosecutor General, who is present in Court in other matters, has waived notice of present Constitution Petition and placed on record the case diary generated through CFMS DC, same is taken on record. From perusal of the case diary, it appears that the challan in the subject case has already been submitted before the competent Court of law and the matter is now fixed for framing of charge. Once the challan has been submitted and cognizance has been taken by the Trial Court, therefore appropriate remedy for the petitioner lies before the said Court. Accordingly, the present Constitution Petition, being not maintainable, stands dismissed. However, the petitioner is at liberty to approach the Trial Court by filing an application under Section 249-A or 265-K, Cr.P.C, as the case may be, for appropriate relief. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
